narrative:
Seven Hills-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,238 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.9 percentage points.
